subject: Sports
title: Giannis: From Street Vendor to MVP
description: A fast breakdown of Giannis: From Street Vendor to MVP for builders.

hook.text: He sold sunglasses on the streets of Athens. He became the NBA's most dominant player.

buildup.text: Giannis Antetokounmpo grew up in poverty in Greece, the son of Nigerian immigrants without citizenship.

discovery.text: Drafted 15th in 2013, he was raw and skinny. Within five years, he became a two-time MVP.

twist.text: In the 2021 Finals, he scored 50 points in the closeout game to bring Milwaukee its first title in 50 years.

climax.text: His journey from stateless street vendor to NBA champion is the most inspiring story in modern sports.

punchline.text: From selling sunglasses to winning championships. The real Greek Freak.

quiz.question: What was Giannis doing before his basketball career?
options: Selling goods on the streets of Athens
Training at an elite basketball academy
